onb_sub_sectors: Select sectors to personalize your dashboard.
onb_sub_scale: This helps us prioritize projects for your capital capacity.
home_subtitle: Ask anything about investment in Indonesia.
home_ai_suffix: , I've identified key strategic projects. New Tax Holiday incentives are available for large-scale investments in this sector.
proj_dummy_desc: A unified generative AI system to resolve information silos via semantic search and intelligent matching, uniting 81 Priority Investment Projects.
proj_dummy_p1: The Investika (PIR) portal currently faces language and information barriers for international investors, with investment data scattered across 6 different silos (Opportunities, Downstream, Regional, Policy, Incentives, and Studies). This project proposes building a unified AI layer that transforms the BKPM portal into an Interactive Investment Assistant.
proj_dummy_p2: Through Agentic AI technology, this platform provides a real-time multilingual bridge (English, Mandarin, Japanese) and a proactive matching engine that automatically aligns investor risk profiles with a national project pipeline worth IDR 239 Trillion.
proj_inn1_desc: Automated translation & summarization for 81 Priority Projects and Pre-FS Studies into major foreign languages.
proj_inn2_desc: Semantic Search-based recommendation system that aligns investor profiles with Downstream data.
proj_inn3_desc: Dynamic proximity visualization of road, port, and electricity infrastructure for 12 IKN Strategic Projects.
proj_inn4_desc: Secure access (Regulatory Sandbox) to feasibility documents with an audit log tracking investor access.
proj_imp1_desc: Direct access to executive summaries via natural language queries without downloading hundreds of PDFs.
proj_imp2_desc: Transforms static interactions into a concierge experience, driving measurable Letters of Intent (LoI).
proj_imp3_desc: Seamless integration between Regional DPMPTSP, Bappenas, and Technical Ministry databases.
login_hero_subtitle: Explore strategic projects, policy insights, and personalized investment support with VestiAI.
policy_subtitle: Comprehensive guide to Indonesia's investment laws, tax incentives, and compliance frameworks.
policy_1_desc: Up to 100% corporate income tax reduction for 5 to 20 years for pioneer industries with a minimum investment of IDR 500 Billion.
policy_2_desc: Ultimate facility combining tax holidays, custom exemptions, and ease of licensing for specific geographic zones.
policy_3_desc: Core regulations governing foreign capital, ownership limits, and legal protections under the Omnibus Law.
